Risk: Loss of critical knowledge during restructuring
Mitigation: Critical-role review, knowledge transfer and rehire pool

Risk: Remaining employees experience burnout after headcount reduction
Mitigation: Workload cap, overtime dashboard, supervisor check-ins and phased hiring

Risk: Pilot results are not statistically representative
Mitigation: Use test-control comparison and predefined success criteria
Data dictionary, validation rules and data-quality log

Risk: Scarce embedded and precision skills remain unavailable
Mitigation: University pipeline, referral, certification and targeted sourcing

Risk: Employees perceive workforce reset as unfair
Mitigation: Documented criteria, legal review, communication and appeal route
Vendor scorecard and incoming quality inspection
